label: Insurance (P/B + ROE + book-value-growth focus)

deferred_concepts.reason: (claims + expenses) / earned_premiums — insurance supplemental disclosure, not standard XBRL
Life-insurance EV is an actuarial estimate, not a GAAP/IFRS concept

notes: Insurance valuation is anchored on book-value compounding (Berkshire-style framing). ROE captures current profitability; book_value_growth captures whether equity per share is compounding or eroding (the latter is a red flag in P&C cycles). Combined ratio (deferred) determines underwriting profitability. Insurers don't have 'sales' or EBITDA — those multiples are absent. forwardPE intentionally absent: insurance EPS forward consensus is unreliable due to catastrophe loss volatility.
